Miami, Booth 344, and the Future of Guest Experience

This September, hospitalityГўв‚¬в„ўs most forward-thinking hoteliers will gather in Miami for the Independent Hotel Show Гўв‚¬вЂќ and yes, DialZero will be there. Booth 344 is where youГўв‚¬в„ўll see how instant, AI-powered guest communication can save your hotel thousands every year. (One NYC property saves $40,000 annually using DialZero.)

The Independent Hotel Show Miami isnГўв‚¬в„ўt just another industry event. ItГўв‚¬в„ўs where new ideas meet real-world solutions, and where we get to show hoteliers exactly how to improve guest satisfaction and protect the bottom line.

HereГўв‚¬в„ўs what weГўв‚¬в„ўll be highlighting at Booth 344:

  • Streamlined Operations & Task Management Гўв‚¬вЂњ Track, assign, and close tasks in real time, all from one intuitive dashboard.

We could go on, but weГўв‚¬в„ўd rather show you in person.
